title: Partial index causes assertion fault on UPDATE OR REPLACE
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER, b INTEGER, c TEXT DEFAULT 'default');
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX t1ab ON t1(a, b);
INSERT INTO t1(a, b, c) VALUES(123, 456, NULL);
UPDATE t1 SET b = NULL WHERE a = 123;
key_bug_features: Partial index causes assertion fault on UPDATE OR REPLACE
